name: Okami-san and Her Seven Companions
original_name: オオカミさんと七人の仲間たち
overview: Ryōko Ōkami is a spunky high school girl who is a member of a "fixer" club called the Otogi High School Bank. She fixes the school's problems with her partner Ringo Akai ("Akazukin-chan").

trailers.title: Okami-san and Her Seven Companions - Official Trailer
